INSERT INTO landing.tax_documents
    (source_type, source_id, subject, sender_email, received_at,
     file_name, file_ext, file_size_bytes, content_preview, raw_json, batch_id)
VALUES
    ('{{ $json.source_type }}', '{{ $json.source_id }}', '{{ $json.subject }}',
     '{{ $json.sender_email }}', '{{ $json.received_at }}',
     null, null, null,
     '{{ $json.content_preview }}', '{{ $json.raw_json }}', {{ $json.batch_id }})
ON CONFLICT (source_type, source_id, COALESCE(file_name, '')) DO NOTHING;
